title: Boot/Kernel Configuration Modified
expression: event.category == 'file' && event.type == 'change' && (contains(file.path || '', '/etc/sysctl') || contains(file.path || '', '/etc/modules-load.d/') || contains(file.path || '', '/etc/modprobe.d/') || contains(file.path || '', '/etc/default/grub') || contains(file.path || '', '/lib/modules/'))
